segments.text: right I nearly forgot about the neck we talked about yeah if there's anything you could do that would be amazing otherwise I've got lots of scarves and P that Compass okay if you tilt head up again now and then slightly away always start with the top one they get harder as they go lower if they're deeper that's not always true depends on the thickness of the line and it can be quite volume heavy it takes quite a bit of this product I prefer using a canul just because there's so many veins you just don't want to be sticking a needle in all the time so much

[Music] I want to see the tip of my canula pointing up cuz you really want to be as close to the dermis as possible so that's why I don't mind seeing this tip I'm doing on purpose and then filling as I slide it in a little bit of Trauma from the ca might actually be good because you get increased collagen production your type four collagen in response to the canula here we go 2 MLS that's made a good difference so far the bevel facing up

I'm a little bit on either side of the line I'm not just in the line obviously it's a huge amount of movement in the neck so I'm just hoping to give it a bit of stability if you yeah if you hold that position now changes what I see in the middle line of neck so I want to go to the midline just notice how the tip of the candle is still pointing up I don't want be disappearing into the any deeper than I have to be superficial injection how does it feel to you all right yeah fine I was surprised how much it didn't

hurt okay got enough to try the lower one the next line down bevel up again I just changed watching the tip little bit on either side this line is a little bit wider isn't it right to the midd line massaging the neck is actually one of the hardest areas cuz you don't really want to compress the too hard when patient faints at least feels slightly threatened I'm

threatened I'm fine tras implicitly [Music] it looks better in this position but of course the challenging thing with this area is the head is so mobile that these lines will F reform in certain positions for sure well I don't think they're going to disappear in any position but they will they do come back when you put your head down there's no filler that will stop that but it would look better at rest at
a neutral position can have one more go in this midpoint very superficial [Music]
[Music] there a little bruise and entry points [Music] funny for bruising cuz they don't bleed much but they just bleed a bit longer mhm okay we're all done wow thank you very much
